title: Prometheus Scrape Target Down Causing Monitoring Blind Spot
symptoms: Grafana dashboards showing 'No Data' for 23 service panels
Prometheus targets page showing 23 targets as DOWN
Prometheus configuration reload log showing parse warning (non-fatal)
AlertManager not receiving any alerts for affected services
Metric gaps in long-term storage (Thanos) for the affected period
root_cause: Malformed Prometheus scrape configuration introduced during service discovery update caused the scrape manager to silently skip an entire target group without raising a fatal error
resolution: Fixed the malformed scrape configuration, triggered a Prometheus reload, verified all 23 targets scraping successfully, and backfilled critical metric gaps where possible
preventive_actions: Implement Prometheus configuration validation in CI before deployment
Add meta-monitoring to alert when scrape targets go down
Create canary scrape target that alerts if Prometheus stops collecting
Implement scrape target count monitoring with change detection
Add Prometheus config reload verification step with target validation

timeline.event: Prometheus config reload with malformed scrape configuration
23 targets silently dropped from scrape schedule
Grafana dashboards begin showing No Data for affected services
Engineer investigating unrelated issue notices missing metrics
Nina Patel alerted to monitoring gap, begins investigation
Malformed scrape config identified in Prometheus configuration
All 23 targets scraping successfully, incident resolved

embedding_summary: Prometheus silently stopped scraping 23 critical targets for 4 hours due to malformed scrape configuration introduced during service discovery update. No alerting was possible for affected services. Resolved by fixing configuration and implementing meta-monitoring for scrape target health.
